narrative:
Highland Local Sd (Medina) school district has 16,288 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.4% D−R vs -28.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
